usage: caseprep [-h] [--version] {generate,build,serve} ...

Generate structured neurosurgical case prep materials.

positional arguments:
  {generate,build,serve}
                        Available commands
    generate            Generate a case prep folder (default command)
    build               Build a populated case prep dossier using the core
                        builder
    serve               Launch the CasePrep web dashboard

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --version             show program's version number and exit
